hooks.name: auto-lint
hooks.description: Automatically runs ESLint on files after they are modified by AI tools, catching style and quality issues immediately

hooks.name: auto-format
hooks.description: Runs Prettier or your configured formatter on saved files after AI edits to ensure consistent code style

hooks.name: secret-scanner
hooks.description: Scans code changes for hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, and credentials before they are committed

hooks.name: test-runner
hooks.description: Automatically runs relevant test suites after code changes to catch regressions immediately

hooks.name: commit-message-validator
hooks.description: Validates commit messages against conventional commits format or custom patterns before committing

hooks.name: branch-protection
hooks.description: Prevents direct commits to protected branches like main or master, enforcing PR-based workflows

hooks.name: dependency-check
hooks.description: Audits npm/yarn dependencies for known vulnerabilities after package changes using npm audit

hooks.name: build-verification
hooks.description: Runs the project build after code changes to ensure nothing breaks compilation or bundling

hooks.name: code-review-trigger
hooks.description: Triggers automated code review checks including complexity analysis and best practice validation

hooks.name: doc-generator
hooks.description: Automatically generates or updates JSDoc/TSDoc documentation comments when functions are modified

hooks.name: changelog-updater
hooks.description: Automatically appends entries to CHANGELOG.md based on commit messages and code changes

hooks.name: license-checker
hooks.description: Validates that all dependencies use approved open-source licenses and flags incompatible ones

hooks.name: type-checker
hooks.description: Runs TypeScript type checking after code modifications to catch type errors early

hooks.name: bundle-size-check
hooks.description: Monitors and alerts when bundle size exceeds configured thresholds after dependency or code changes

hooks.name: accessibility-audit
hooks.description: Runs automated accessibility checks on UI components to ensure WCAG compliance

hooks.name: performance-budget
hooks.description: Enforces performance budgets by checking metrics like load time, bundle size, and memory usage

hooks.name: deploy-gate
hooks.description: Validates deployment prerequisites including passing tests, clean builds, and approved reviews before deploy

hooks.name: notification-slack
hooks.description: Sends Slack notifications when the AI agent completes tasks, encounters errors, or needs attention

hooks.name: notification-discord
hooks.description: Posts Discord messages when AI agent events occur, including task completion and error alerts

hooks.name: stop-summary
hooks.description: Generates a summary of all changes made during an AI agent session when the agent stops

hooks.name: file-guard
hooks.description: Prevents AI tools from modifying protected files like .env, configs, or lock files without explicit approval

hooks.name: todo-tracker
hooks.description: Scans for new TODO/FIXME comments added by AI and logs them to a tracking file or issue tracker

hooks.name: complexity-guard
hooks.description: Checks cyclomatic complexity of modified functions and warns when thresholds are exceeded

hooks.name: env-validator
hooks.description: Validates that required environment variables are set and properly formatted before running tasks

hooks.name: migration-check
hooks.description: Detects database schema changes and reminds to create migration files when models are modified
